surface: Complete port of react-hook-form 7.81.0 (upstream commit b7df98c2) with the upstream test suite ported: `useForm`, `useController`, `useFieldArray`, `useFormState`, `useWatch`, `useFormContext`/`FormProvider`, schema resolvers, and all validation modes.
divergences: `register()` returns `onInput` (octane's native per-keystroke event) instead of React's synthetic `onChange`; mode names and `register` option keys keep the upstream spelling.

Ported tests directly assert Octane's documented microtask-flush commit granularity, eager `Object.is` setState bailout, and native input-event delivery; the suite contains no skipped or expected-failure cases.
ssr: Supported and tested — the upstream `*.server.test.tsx` suite runs via `octane/server` with byte-identical markup.
